lineage.Process: CopyFeatures Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON "S:\CARTOGRAFIA\Término municipal y divisiones administrativas\6 202401 Completo y mojones\DescargaCNIG_20240516\SHP_ETRS89\ADECUACION_TERMINO_IGN\Default.gdb\EMA\Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON" # # # #

<operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_OBJECTID</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_Join_Count</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_TARGET_FID</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_geodb_oid</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_FID_SECCIO</field_name></DeleteField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>COD_DIS</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>2</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>NOM_DIS</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>COD_BAR</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>3</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>NOM_BAR</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>50</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>COD_SECCION</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>5</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><FeatureDataset>EMA</FeatureDataset><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=S:\CARTOGRAFIA\Término municipal y divisiones administrativas\6 202401 Completo y mojones\DescargaCNIG_20240516\SHP_ETRS89\ADECUACION_TERMINO_IGN\Default.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_CODDIS</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_NOMDIS</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_CODSECCION</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_CODBAR</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_NOMBAR</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>

mojones\DescargaCNIG_20240516\SHP_ETRS89\ADECUACION_TERMINO_IGN\Default.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>VALUNICOS</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>MESAN</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>ELECTO</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>6</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>LOCAL_ELECTORAL</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>6</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>FCH_ALTA</field_name><field_type>DATE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>FCH_BAJA</field_name><field_type>DATE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>ACUERDO</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>OBSERVACIONES</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.1.0'><FeatureDataset>EMA</FeatureDataset><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=S:\CARTOGRAFIA\Término municipal y divisiones administrativas\6 202401 Completo y mojones\DescargaCNIG_20240516\SHP_ETRS89\ADECUACION_TERMINO_IGN\Default.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMFeatureDatasetDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_VALUNICOS</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_MESASN</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_ELECTO</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_COLEGIO</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_FCH_ALT</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_FCH_BAJ</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_OBSERVACIONES</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_ACUERDO</field_name><field_name>Seciones_TM_IGN_POLIGON_AddSpatialJoin_ORIG_FID</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>

Append 'C:\Users\miguelcm\AppData\Roaming\Esri\ArcGISPro\Favorites\PRO 10.8 SIG_CARTOGRAFIA_READ.sde\CARTOGRAFIA.LIMITES_ADMINISTRATIVOS\CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES_2026' "C:\Users\miguelcm\AppData\Roaming\Esri\ArcGISPro\Favorites\PRO 10.8 SIG_CARTOGRAFIA_OWNER.sde\CARTOGRAFIA.LIMITES_ADMINISTRATIVOS\CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES" "Input fields must match target fields" # # # # NOT_UPDATE_GEOMETRY

ExportFeatures CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES C:\00_2026\TEMPORAL\LTM\SECCIONES_CENSALES.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "COD_DIS "COD_DIS" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,COD_DIS,0,1;NOM_DIS "NOM_DIS" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,NOM_DIS,0,49;COD_BAR "COD_BAR" true true false 3 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,COD_BAR,0,2;NOM_BAR "NOM_BAR" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,NOM_BAR,0,49;COD_SECCION "COD_SECCION" true true false 5 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,COD_SECCION,0,4;VALUNICOS "VALUNICOS" true true false 4 Long 0 10,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,VALUNICOS,-1,-1;MESAN "MESAN" true true false 4 Long 0 10,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,MESAN,-1,-1;ELECTO "ELECTO" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,ELECTO,0,5;LOCAL_ELECTORAL "LOCAL_ELECTORAL" true true false 6 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,LOCAL_ELECTORAL,0,5;FCH_ALTA "FCH_ALTA" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,FCH_ALTA,-1,-1;FCH_BAJA "FCH_BAJA" true true false 8 Date 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,FCH_BAJA,-1,-1;ACUERDO "ACUERDO" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,ACUERDO,0,254;OBSERVACIONES "OBSERVACIONES" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,CARTOGRAFIA.SECCIONES_CENSALES,OBSERVACIONES,0,254" #
CalculateGeometryAttributes SECCIONES_CENSALES "Area AREA" # # # "Igual que la entrada"

CopyMultiple "C:\00_2026\TEMPORAL\LTM\BARRIOS.shp shapefile_polygon;C:\00_2026\TEMPORAL\LTM\DISTRITOS.shp shapefile_polygon;C:\00_2026\TEMPORAL\LTM\SECCIONES_CENSALES.shp shapefile_polygon;C:\00_2026\TEMPORAL\LTM\TERMINO_MUNICIPAL.shp shapefile_polygon" C:\00_2026\TEMPORAL\LTM\SHP BARRIOS;DISTRITOS;SECCIONES_CENSALES;TERMINO_MUNICIPAL "BARRIOS FeatureClass BARRIOS.shp #;DISTRITOS FeatureClass DISTRITOS.shp #;SECCIONES_CENSALES FeatureClass SECCIONES_CENSALES.shp #;TERMINO_MUNICIPAL FeatureClass TERMINO_MUNICIPAL.shp #"

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
